elements.text: Arrange these crossword fragments to create two completed symmetrical crosswords.
Fill the grid so that every column, row and 3x3 square includes all the digits from 1 to 9

Fitting | Sheep Gripped | Ale | Flexible pipe | Bravery | Urban areas | Jamaica _, Cornish novel | Female person | Plural of is Element | Verge | Stage | On top of | Mature | Rent | Plant part | Total up | Info | Relieve | Roamed | Grieving wife | Celtic language | Tidying up | Fishing tool | Mistake | Cylinder | Be inclined | Court penalty Caustic | Ascend | Wager Snow runner | Drink Male child | Spike of wheat Ocean | Epoch | Colour hair | Operate | Price | Peruse writing | Heavens Not that | Pyre | Truck | Finish | Beloved | Evaluate
The arrows show the direction in which the answer to each clue should be placed.
